requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection for BESS — MEA / STELCO / FENAKA Approval, 230/400 V 50 Hz, and Voltage Mismatch with China LV
requirement_topic.zh: BESS并网——MEA / STELCO / FENAKA审批、230/400 V 50 Hz及与中国低压电网的电压差异
requirement_topic.zht: BESS併網——MEA / STELCO / FENAKA審批、230/400 V 50 Hz及與中國低壓電網的電壓差異

summary.en: Maldives operates a fragmented island-grid structure. STELCO (State Electric Company Limited) serves Greater Malé and a number of resort islands; FENAKA Corporation serves the outer-atoll islands. The Maldives Energy Authority (MEA), under the Ministry of Environment, Climate Change and Technology, is the national energy regulator responsible for licensing, tariff regulation, and overseeing grid-connection requirements. All grid-connected BESS installations — including ADB/AIIB-funded utility-scale solar-plus-storage projects on inhabited outer atolls — require MEA project approval and utility (STELCO or FENAKA) technical review before energisation. Maldives grid parameters are 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. IMPORTANT: China's nominal LV is 220/380 V — Maldives shares 50 Hz but operates at a DIFFERENT nominal voltage (230/400 V vs China 220/380 V). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) validated for China's 220/380 V must be reconfigured and retested for Maldives 230/400 V. IEC 62933 series (particularly IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2) and IEC 63056 (Secondary Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for Connection to Utility Power Supply Networks) are expected as technical references in project specifications. No publicly accessible consolidated MEA technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection was confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific terms must be obtained directly from MEA, STELCO, or FENAKA at the earliest project stage.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫采用分散的岛屿电网结构。STELCO（国家电力有限公司）服务马累大区及部分度假岛屿；FENAKA集团服务外部环礁岛屿。马尔代夫能源局（MEA）隶属环境、气候变化与技术部，是负责许可、关税监管及并网要求监督的国家能源监管机构。所有并网BESS装置——包括ADB/亚投行资助的有人居住外部环礁公用事业规模光储项目——须在通电前取得MEA项目审批及公用事业（STELCO或FENAKA）技术审查。马尔代夫电网参数为单相230 V、三相400 V，频率50 Hz。重要提示：中国低压标准电压为220/380 V——马尔代夫与中国同为50 Hz，但标称电压不同（230/400 V对比中国220/380 V）。针对中国220/380 V验证的BESS储能变流器（PCS）须重新配置并测试以适应马尔代夫230/400 V。IEC 62933系列（特别是IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2）及IEC 63056（电化学储能系统用二次电池——接入公用电网要求）预计作为项目规格中的技术参考。截至本数据集日期，未确认MEA公开发布专门针对BESS并网的综合技术规格；项目专属条款须在项目最早阶段直接向MEA、STELCO或FENAKA获取。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫採用分散的島嶼電網結構。STELCO（國家電力有限公司）服務馬累大區及部分度假島嶼；FENAKA集團服務外部環礁島嶼。馬爾地夫能源局（MEA）隸屬環境、氣候變化與技術部，是負責許可、關稅監管及併網要求監督的國家能源監管機構。所有併網BESS裝置——包括ADB/亞投行資助的有人居住外部環礁公用事業規模光儲項目——須在通電前取得MEA項目審批及公用事業（STELCO或FENAKA）技術審查。馬爾地夫電網參數為單相230 V、三相400 V，頻率50 Hz。重要提示：中國低壓標準電壓為220/380 V——馬爾地夫與中國同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同（230/400 V對比中國220/380 V）。針對中國220/380 V驗證的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須重新配置並測試以適應馬爾地夫230/400 V。IEC 62933系列（特別是IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2）及IEC 63056（電化學儲能系統用二次電池——接入公用電網要求）預計作為項目規格中的技術參考。截至本數據集日期，未確認MEA公開發布專門針對BESS併網的綜合技術規格；項目專屬條款須在項目最早階段直接向MEA、STELCO或FENAKA獲取。

standards_or_laws: Maldives Energy Authority (MEA) — national energy regulator; project approval required for all grid-connected BESS
STELCO (State Electric Company Limited) — utility grid-connection approval for Greater Malé and connected islands
FENAKA Corporation — utility grid-connection approval for outer-atoll islands
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 63056 — Secondary Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for Connection to Utility Power Supply Networks (IEC-aligned grid-connection reference)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). Critically, this is a DIFFERENT voltage from Maldives 230/400 V. PCS firmware and protection parameters validated for China 220/380 V must be re-parameterised and retested for Maldives 230/400 V before connection testing and commissioning. Do NOT assert that Chinese products 'match Maldives voltage' on the basis of shared 50 Hz frequency — the nominal voltages differ.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。关键提示：这与马尔代夫230/400 V为不同电压。针对中国220/380 V验证的储能变流器固件和保护参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对马尔代夫230/400 V进行参数配置和重新测试。不得仅凭共同的50 Hz频率断言中国产品「与马尔代夫电压匹配」——标称电压不同。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。關鍵提示：這與馬爾地夫230/400 V為不同電壓。針對中國220/380 V驗證的儲能變流器韌體和保護參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對馬爾地夫230/400 V進行參數配置和重新測試。不得僅憑共同的50 Hz頻率斷言中國產品「與馬爾地夫電壓匹配」——標稱電壓不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy MEA, STELCO, or FENAKA grid-connection requirements. Critical differences: (a) voltage — Maldives is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; despite sharing 50 Hz, the nominal voltages are different and PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and inverter transformer tap positions must be reconfigured and retested; (b) island-grid stability — Maldives outer-atoll grids are isolated small systems with limited inertia; BESS must be designed to handle frequency excursions and voltage swings more severe than typical mainland grid events; (c) space constraint — atoll installations are physically space-limited and container-form BESS is expected; confirm footprint and weight with FENAKA or STELCO at the project design stage; (d) IEC 62933 and IEC 63056 evidence — where project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1, IEC 62933-5-2, or IEC 63056 compliance, prepare documentation accordingly as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (e) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA or communication interface protocol required by STELCO or FENAKA for BESS monitoring (IEC 61850, Modbus TCP, or project-specific specification).
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足MEA、STELCO或FENAKA并网要求。关键差异：（a）电压——马尔代夫为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；尽管同为50 Hz，标称电压不同，储能变流器电压保护阈值、穿越参数及逆变器变压器抽头位置须重新配置并重新测试；（b）岛屿电网稳定性——马尔代夫外部环礁电网是惯性有限的孤立小型系统，BESS须设计为能够处理比典型大陆电网事件更严重的频率波动和电压波动；（c）空间限制——环礁安装场地物理空间有限，预期采用集装箱式BESS；在项目设计阶段与FENAKA或STELCO确认占地面积和重量；（d）IEC 62933和IEC 63056证据——若项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1、IEC 62933-5-2或IEC 63056合规，须相应准备文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（e）通信协议——确认STELCO或FENAKA对BESS监控所要求的SCADA或通信接口协议（IEC 61850、Modbus TCP或项目专属规格）。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足MEA、STELCO或FENAKA併網要求。關鍵差異：（a）電壓——馬爾地夫為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；儘管同為50 Hz，標稱電壓不同，儲能變流器電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及逆變器變壓器抽頭位置須重新配置並重新測試；（b）島嶼電網穩定性——馬爾地夫外部環礁電網是慣性有限的孤立小型系統，BESS須設計為能夠處理比典型大陸電網事件更嚴重的頻率波動和電壓波動；（c）空間限制——環礁安裝場地物理空間有限，預期採用貨櫃式BESS；在項目設計階段與FENAKA或STELCO確認佔地面積和重量；（d）IEC 62933和IEC 63056證據——若項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1、IEC 62933-5-2或IEC 63056合規，須相應準備文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（e）通訊協議——確認STELCO或FENAKA對BESS監控所要求的SCADA或通訊接口協議（IEC 61850、Modbus TCP或項目專屬規格）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MEA project approval and STELCO or FENAKA grid-connection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Maldives; technical requirements are project-specific and must be confirmed directly with MEA and the relevant utility
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy MEA, STELCO, or FENAKA grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Maldives 230/400 V at 50 Hz — note this is a DIFFERENT voltage from China 220/380 V, not a match. Island-grid stability requirements for low-inertia atoll grids add further technical design constraints beyond typical Chinese domestic specifications. Engage MEA, STELCO, or FENAKA at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement terms, applicable IEC 62933 or IEC 63056 evidence, and SCADA communication protocol requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足MEA、STELCO或FENAKA并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对马尔代夫230/400 V 50 Hz进行参数配置——注意这与中国220/380 V为不同电压，并非匹配。低惯性环礁电网的岛屿电网稳定性要求，在典型中国国内规格之外增加了更多技术设计约束。应在项目最早阶段与MEA、STELCO或FENAKA接触，确定并网协议条款、适用IEC 62933或IEC 63056证据及SCADA通信协议要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足MEA、STELCO或FENAKA併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對馬爾地夫230/400 V 50 Hz進行參數配置——注意這與中國220/380 V為不同電壓，並非匹配。低慣性環礁電網的島嶼電網穩定性要求，在典型中國國內規格之外增加了更多技術設計約束。應在項目最早階段與MEA、STELCO或FENAKA接觸，確定併網協議條款、適用IEC 62933或IEC 63056證據及SCADA通訊協議要求。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62933 System-Level Requirements and ADB/AIIB Project Specification Compliance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62933系统级要求及ADB/亚投行项目规格合规
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62933系統級要求及ADB/亞投行項目規格合規

summary.en: The majority of utility-scale BESS deployments in the Maldives are financed through multilateral development bank (MDB) programmes — principally the Asian Development Bank (ADB) and the Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB) — as part of renewable energy and energy transition projects targeting diesel substitution on outer atolls. ADB procurement standards and MDB project specifications routinely reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards as the technical baseline for BESS system performance and safety. IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 covers unit parameters and testing methods; IEC 62933-5-1:2024 covers safety considerations and hazard identification; IEC 62933-5-2 covers safety requirements for electrochemical-based systems. Project specifications may also reference IEC 63056 for grid-interconnection requirements. Compliance with these IEC standards — evidenced by type-test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories — is expected as a technical qualification criterion in procurement tenders. China GB/T standards (GB/T 36558, GB/T 34131) are not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933 in MDB-financed project specifications.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫大多数公用事业规模BESS部署通过多边开发银行（MDB）计划融资——主要是亚洲开发银行（ADB）和亚洲基础设施投资银行（亚投行）——作为针对外部环礁柴油替代的可再生能源和能源转型项目的一部分。ADB采购标准和MDB项目规格通常将IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准作为BESS系统性能和安全的技术基准。IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021涵盖单元参数和测试方法；IEC 62933-5-1:2024涵盖安全考量和危险识别；IEC 62933-5-2涵盖电化学系统安全要求。项目规格还可能引用IEC 63056作为并网要求依据。遵守上述IEC标准——以ILAC认可实验室型式测试报告为证——预计作为采购招标中的技术资格标准。中国GB/T标准（GB/T 36558、GB/T 34131）在MDB资助项目规格中不被接受为等同于IEC 62933的依据。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫大多數公用事業規模BESS部署通過多邊開發銀行（MDB）計畫融資——主要是亞洲開發銀行（ADB）和亞洲基礎設施投資銀行（亞投行）——作為針對外部環礁柴油替代的可再生能源和能源轉型項目的一部分。ADB採購標準和MDB項目規格通常將IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準作為BESS系統性能和安全的技術基準。IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021涵蓋單元參數和測試方法；IEC 62933-5-1:2024涵蓋安全考量和危險識別；IEC 62933-5-2涵蓋電化學系統安全要求。項目規格還可能引用IEC 63056作為併網要求依據。遵守上述IEC標準——以ILAC認可實驗室型式測試報告為證——預計作為採購招標中的技術資格標準。中國GB/T標準（GB/T 36558、GB/T 34131）在MDB資助項目規格中不被接受為等同於IEC 62933的依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems
IEC 63056 — Secondary Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for Connection to Utility Power Supply Networks
ADB Procurement Policy (2017, as amended) — sets technical qualification standards for MDB-financed energy storage projects

summary.en: Chinese BESS system-level standards include GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Specification for Battery Management Systems in Electrochemical Energy Storage). These are mandatory or voluntary national standards applicable to China domestic projects and are technically substantive. However, they are structured around China's grid characteristics (220/380 V, NEA approval pathways, China-specific grid code references) and are not technically harmonised with IEC 62933 series. ADB and AIIB project assessment bodies do not accept GB/T 34131 or GB/T 36558 certificates as substitutes for IEC 62933 type-test evidence.
summary.zh: 中国BESS系统级标准包括GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能系统电池管理系统技术规范）。这些是适用于中国国内项目的强制性或自愿性国家标准，技术内容实质性强。然而，它们围绕中国电网特性（220/380 V、NEA审批路径、中国专属电网规范参考）构建，与IEC 62933系列在技术上未协调。ADB和亚投行项目评估机构不接受GB/T 34131或GB/T 36558证书作为IEC 62933型式测试证据的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS系統級標準包括GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能系統電池管理系統技術規範）。這些是適用於中國國內項目的強制性或自願性國家標準，技術內容實質性強。然而，它們圍繞中國電網特性（220/380 V、NEA審批路徑、中國專屬電網規範參考）構建，與IEC 62933系列在技術上未協調。ADB和亞投行項目評估機構不接受GB/T 34131或GB/T 36558證書作為IEC 62933型式測試證據的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for Battery Management Systems in Electrochemical Energy Storage)

gap.en: Gap: ADB/AIIB-financed Maldives BESS projects require IEC 62933-series evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories. Chinese GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 compliance is not accepted as equivalent. Exporters bidding on MDB-financed Maldives tenders should: (a) obtain IEC 62933-2-1 type-test certificates for the specific BESS system configuration being supplied; (b) obtain IEC 62933-5-2 safety evidence for the electrochemical system; (c) confirm whether IEC 63056 grid-interconnection test evidence is required by the project specification or STELCO/FENAKA connection agreement; (d) prepare IEC 62933-compliant factory acceptance test (FAT) and site acceptance test (SAT) procedures as these are typically specified in ADB project contracts.
gap.zh: 差距：ADB/亚投行资助的马尔代夫BESS项目要求来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62933系列证据。中国GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131合规不被接受为等效依据。参与MDB资助马尔代夫招标的出口商应：（a）为所供应的特定BESS系统配置取得IEC 62933-2-1型式测试证书；（b）为电化学系统取得IEC 62933-5-2安全证据；（c）确认项目规格或STELCO/FENAKA并网协议是否要求IEC 63056并网测试证据；（d）准备符合IEC 62933的工厂验收测试（FAT）和现场验收测试（SAT）程序，因为这些通常在ADB项目合同中规定。
gap.zht: 差距：ADB/亞投行資助的馬爾地夫BESS項目要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62933系列證據。中國GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131合規不被接受為等效依據。參與MDB資助馬爾地夫招標的出口商應：（a）為所供應的特定BESS系統配置取得IEC 62933-2-1型式測試證書；（b）為電化學系統取得IEC 62933-5-2安全證據；（c）確認項目規格或STELCO/FENAKA併網協議是否要求IEC 63056併網測試證據；（d）準備符合IEC 62933的工廠驗收測試（FAT）和現場驗收測試（SAT）程序，因為這些通常在ADB項目合同中規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for MDB-financed projects — ADB/AIIB procurement standards require IEC 62933 evidence; MEA and utility approval for non-MDB projects is project-specific and must be confirmed directly
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 36558) or mandatory depending on project type; neither is accepted as IEC 62933 equivalent in Maldives MDB project context

source.publisher: Asian Development Bank (ADB) — Maldives energy project portfolio

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ADB/AIIB-financed Maldives BESS projects require IEC 62933 series compliance evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories. Chinese GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 certifications are not accepted as substitutes. Chinese BESS exporters competing for Maldives MDB-financed tenders must obtain IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 type-test evidence and prepare IEC-aligned FAT/SAT procedures before tender submission. Confirm IEC 63056 and specific grid-interconnection test requirements with the project specification documents or the relevant utility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ADB/亚投行资助的马尔代夫BESS项目要求来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62933系列合规证据。中国GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131认证不被接受为替代依据。参与马尔代夫MDB资助招标的中国BESS出口商须在投标前取得IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2型式测试证据，并准备符合IEC的FAT/SAT程序。请向项目规格文件或相关公用事业单位确认IEC 63056及具体并网测试要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ADB/亞投行資助的馬爾地夫BESS項目要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62933系列合規證據。中國GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131認證不被接受為替代依據。參與馬爾地夫MDB資助招標的中國BESS出口商須在投標前取得IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2型式測試證據，並準備符合IEC的FAT/SAT程序。請向項目規格文件或相關公用事業單位確認IEC 63056及具體併網測試要求。

requirement_topic.en: Environmental Derating — Equatorial Heat, Humidity, and Salt-Mist for Maldives BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 环境降额——马尔代夫BESS的赤道高温、高湿及盐雾
requirement_topic.zht: 環境降額——馬爾地夫BESS的赤道高溫、高濕及鹽霧

summary.en: Maldives presents extreme environmental conditions for BESS installations: ambient temperatures consistently range from 28°C to 35°C year-round with high solar irradiance; relative humidity is routinely above 80% and can approach saturation in coastal and marine environments; direct salt-mist exposure is unavoidable on most atolls given all installation sites are within metres of the sea. These conditions significantly stress BESS thermal management, battery cycle life, enclosure integrity, and power electronics reliability. MEA and project specifications for ADB/AIIB-funded projects are expected to require: (a) IP55 or IP65 minimum enclosure rating for outdoor installations; (b) explicit corrosion-resistance evidence for salt-mist environments per IEC 60068-2-52 (cyclic salt mist) or equivalent; (c) documented thermal derating curves and battery management system (BMS) high-temperature cut-off behaviour; (d) HVAC or active thermal management systems sized for 35°C ambient continuous operation. Project specifications may require independent environmental qualification testing under IEC 60068 series conditions. No single published MEA environmental standard for BESS was identified as of the dataset date — specifications are project-specific.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫为BESS安装提供了极端环境条件：全年环境温度持续在28°C至35°C之间，太阳辐照强度高；相对湿度通常超过80%，在沿海和海洋环境中可接近饱和；由于几乎所有安装场地均距海面数米，直接盐雾暴露不可避免。这些条件对BESS热管理、电池循环寿命、外壳完整性和电力电子可靠性造成显著压力。MEA及ADB/亚投行资助项目的项目规格预计将要求：（a）户外安装最低IP55或IP65防护等级；（b）符合IEC 60068-2-52（循环盐雾）或等效标准的盐雾环境耐腐蚀性明确证据；（c）记录在案的热降额曲线和电池管理系统（BMS）高温切断行为；（d）针对35°C环境温度连续运行设计的暖通空调或主动热管理系统。项目规格可能要求按IEC 60068系列条件进行独立环境鉴定测试。截至本数据集日期，未发现MEA专门针对BESS的单一已公布环境标准——规格为项目专属。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫為BESS安裝提供了極端環境條件：全年環境溫度持續在28°C至35°C之間，太陽輻照強度高；相對濕度通常超過80%，在沿海和海洋環境中可接近飽和；由於幾乎所有安裝場地均距海面數米，直接鹽霧暴露不可避免。這些條件對BESS熱管理、電池循環壽命、外殼完整性和電力電子可靠性造成顯著壓力。MEA及ADB/亞投行資助項目的項目規格預計將要求：（a）戶外安裝最低IP55或IP65防護等級；（b）符合IEC 60068-2-52（循環鹽霧）或等效標準的鹽霧環境耐腐蝕性明確證據；（c）記錄在案的熱降額曲線和電池管理系統（BMS）高溫切斷行為；（d）針對35°C環境溫度連續運行設計的暖通空調或主動熱管理系統。項目規格可能要求按IEC 60068系列條件進行獨立環境鑒定測試。截至本數據集日期，未發現MEA專門針對BESS的單一已公布環境標準——規格為項目專屬。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental Testing — Tests: Test Kb: Salt Mist, Cyclic (corrosion protection qualification for marine environments)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries — includes high-temperature test requirements relevant to tropical ambient conditions
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters — covers rated operating temperature range and derating documentation requirements
Maldives Energy Authority (MEA) — project approval authority; specific published environmental standard for BESS not confirmed as of dataset date — verify requirements directly

summary.en: Chinese BESS type-tests are typically conducted at 25°C ±5°C standard ambient conditions per GB/T 36276 or GB 38031. Chinese domestic installations in tropical southern provinces (Hainan, Guangdong, Yunnan) may involve higher temperature operating conditions but specific IEC 60068-2-52 salt-mist qualification testing is not a standard requirement in Chinese domestic GB type-testing for stationary BESS. IP55 or IP65 enclosures may be specified for outdoor Chinese BESS installations but the specific marine-salt-mist corrosion evidence required for Maldives atoll conditions is not routinely provided in Chinese domestic product documentation. Thermal derating data is generally available in Chinese product datasheets but may not be presented in the format expected by ADB project specifications.
summary.zh: 中国BESS型式测试通常依据GB/T 36276或GB 38031在25°C ±5°C标准环境条件下进行。中国热带南部省份（海南、广东、云南）的国内安装可能涉及较高温度运行条件，但IEC 60068-2-52盐雾鉴定测试并非中国固定式BESS国内GB型式测试的标准要求。IP55或IP65外壳可能在中国户外BESS安装中规定，但马尔代夫环礁条件所需的特定海洋盐雾腐蚀证据并不常见于中国国内产品文件。热降额数据通常可在中国产品数据表中获取，但其呈现格式可能不符合ADB项目规格的预期。
summary.zht: 中國BESS型式測試通常依據GB/T 36276或GB 38031在25°C ±5°C標準環境條件下進行。中國熱帶南部省份（海南、廣東、雲南）的國內安裝可能涉及較高溫度運行條件，但IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧鑒定測試並非中國固定式BESS國內GB型式測試的標準要求。IP55或IP65外殼可能在中國戶外BESS安裝中規定，但馬爾地夫環礁條件所需的特定海洋鹽霧腐蝕證據並不常見於中國國內產品文件。熱降額數據通常可在中國產品數據表中獲取，但其呈現格式可能不符合ADB項目規格的預期。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (standard ambient test conditions; tropical derating not specified)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (EV cell safety — referenced for cell-level tests; not a stationary BESS standard)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic BESS type-tests are conducted at 25°C standard ambient and do not include marine salt-mist qualification. Maldives project specifications require explicit environmental evidence covering continuous 35°C ambient operation, relative humidity above 80%, and marine salt-mist corrosion resistance. Exporters should: (a) obtain or commission IEC 60068-2-52 cyclic salt-mist corrosion qualification for enclosures and exposed components; (b) confirm IP65 or higher enclosure rating for all outdoor-installed BESS components; (c) document BMS high-temperature cut-off thresholds, thermal derating curves to 40°C ambient, and HVAC system sizing for 35°C continuous operation; (d) provide a site-specific thermal analysis demonstrating system capacity at Maldives ambient conditions as part of ADB project technical submission.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内BESS型式测试在25°C标准环境下进行，不包括海洋盐雾资质认证。马尔代夫项目规格要求提供涵盖35°C环境温度连续运行、相对湿度超过80%及海洋盐雾腐蚀抵抗力的明确环境证据。出口商应：（a）为外壳和暴露部件取得或委托进行IEC 60068-2-52循环盐雾腐蚀资质认证；（b）确认所有户外安装BESS部件的IP65或更高防护等级；（c）记录BMS高温切断阈值、至40°C环境温度的热降额曲线及针对35°C连续运行的暖通空调系统规格；（d）作为ADB项目技术提交的一部分，提供展示马尔代夫环境条件下系统容量的现场专项热分析。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內BESS型式測試在25°C標準環境下進行，不包括海洋鹽霧資質認證。馬爾地夫項目規格要求提供涵蓋35°C環境溫度連續運行、相對濕度超過80%及海洋鹽霧腐蝕抵抗力的明確環境證據。出口商應：（a）為外殼和暴露部件取得或委托進行IEC 60068-2-52循環鹽霧腐蝕資質認證；（b）確認所有戶外安裝BESS部件的IP65或更高防護等級；（c）記錄BMS高溫切斷閾值、至40°C環境溫度的熱降額曲線及針對35°C連續運行的暖通空調系統規格；（d）作為ADB項目技術提交的一部分，提供展示馬爾地夫環境條件下系統容量的現場專項熱分析。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — ADB/AIIB project specifications and MEA approval for Maldives atoll installations require environmental qualification evidence for extreme heat, humidity, and marine salt conditions; no single published mandatory MEA environmental standard confirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — standard Chinese domestic BESS type-tests do not include marine salt-mist qualification or 35°C continuous ambient derating documentation

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 60068-2-52 Environmental Testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese domestic BESS type-test documentation does not cover Maldives-specific environmental conditions — equatorial ambient heat (up to 35°C), humidity above 80%, and marine salt-mist exposure. These are critical for cycle life, enclosure integrity, and power electronics reliability in atoll installations. Obtain IEC 60068-2-52 salt-mist qualification, confirm IP65+ enclosure ratings, document thermal derating to 40°C ambient, and provide site-specific thermal analysis before submitting ADB/AIIB project bids or applying for MEA approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国标准国内BESS型式测试文件不涵盖马尔代夫特定环境条件——赤道环境高温（最高35°C）、湿度超过80%及海洋盐雾暴露。这些条件对环礁安装中的循环寿命、外壳完整性和电力电子可靠性至关重要。在提交ADB/亚投行项目投标或申请MEA审批前，须取得IEC 60068-2-52盐雾资质认证、确认IP65+防护等级、记录至40°C环境的热降额，并提供现场专项热分析。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國標準國內BESS型式測試文件不涵蓋馬爾地夫特定環境條件——赤道環境高溫（最高35°C）、濕度超過80%及海洋鹽霧暴露。這些條件對環礁安裝中的循環壽命、外殼完整性和電力電子可靠性至關重要。在提交ADB/亞投行項目投標或申請MEA審批前，須取得IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧資質認證、確認IP65+防護等級、記錄至40°C環境的熱降額，並提供現場專項熱分析。
